# Dale Nguyen

> Software Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. Personal site, technical blog, and digital portfolio covering Angular, AnalogJS, TypeScript, frontend architecture, and applied AI.

This site is a statically prerendered AnalogJS (Angular) application. The blog publishes in-depth, hands-on engineering write-ups; the learning section hosts interactive explainers.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://dalenguyen.me/): Biography, architectural philosophy, and digital portfolio.
- [Blog](https://dalenguyen.me/blog): Technical articles on web development and AI.
- [Learning](https://dalenguyen.me/learn): Interactive explainers and notes.

## Resources

- [Sitemap](https://dalenguyen.me/sitemap.xml): Full list of crawlable URLs.

## Contact

- Email: dale@dalenguyen.me
